description.en: Defensive system that utilizes low-level fitting slots and does not regenerate on its own.
Instant-hitting weapon system with non-delayed reload using crystals as charges. Deals EM and Thermal damage types.
Guided weapon system with delayed impact and broad selection of damage types.
Instant-hitting weapon system requiring no capacitor to fire. Use ammunition dealing a broad selection of damage types.
Unmanned and deployable craft with versatile functions and broad selection of damage types.
Instant-hitting weapon system with fast reload time. Deals Kinetic and Thermal damage types.
Disruption system that either leeches or neutralizes enemy capacitors, causing active modules to shut down.
Disruption system that cripples targeting range and scan resolution, making it more difficult for enemies to acquire targets.
Disruption system that has a chance to disable the targeting systems of enemy ships.
Disruption system that increases enemy signature radius, making them easier to hit.
Disruption systems that reduce performance of enemy turrets.
Tackling system that reduces speed of enemy ships.
Tackling system that prevents warping for enemy ships.
Defensive system that utilizes medium-level fitting slots and regenerates slowly on its own.
Hulls with good damage and mobility. Recommended for attrition, hit-and-run, and pursuit tactics.
Hulls with good damage and defenses. Recommended for heavy frontline brawling.
Hulls able to field debilitating systems with great proficiency. Recommend as force multipliers in fleet engagements.
Hulls able to repair or assist other vessels in combat. Recommended as force multipliers in fleet engagements.
Hulls capable of transporting a massive quantity of goods. Recommended for industrial or logistical purposes.
Hulls capable of all kinds of material collecting activities. Recommended for any gathering operation.
Hulls made to scout and chart hostile space. Recommended for any reconnaissance operation.
Hulls capable of pinning the enemy down. Recommended to prevent the target from escaping.
Primarily fitted with Small Modules.
Primarily fitted with Medium Modules.
Primarily fitted with Large Modules.
Primarily fitted with Capital Modules.
Precursor Weapon system with increasing damage for each cycle on a target. Uses Exotic Plasma charges and deals Thermal and Explosive damage types.
Equally capable at using either armor or shield defenses.
Arcing weapon system that hits multiple targets. Deals EM and Kinetic damage types.
Boarding party weapon system that applies steady damage over time and bypasses damage resistances.
